chunks.text: Plot Examples Plot Examples The following pages contain examples of the Plot class, which draws various kinds of two-dimensional plots of data. While every effort has been made to make these demos work with popular browsers, the reality is that Java

k with popular browsers, the reality is that Java is a relatively immature language, and different browsers and installations support different versions. Please let us know if you encounter difficulties. One known problem is that if you have a CLASS

ies. One known problem is that if you have a CLASSPATH environment set when you started your browser, you may get an error message when accessing some of the demos. We suggest unsetting this environment variable, restarting your browser (and sending

nt variable, restarting your browser (and sending email to Sun's Java team to complain about the way the CLASSPATH environment variable works). You may also want to check the Java FAQ . Fourier series approximation plot Black and white plot using uni
